title: [Brayern Island, Portal Dais]
description: Scratches mar the ground, evidence of objects being dragged along toward the stone stairs and down into the fortress.  The jungle cliffs outside the fortress are visible over the blue-green wooden walls, with twining vines plunging down sheer rock faces and out of sight.  To the north, a tall white stone arch containing opaque, wavering energies stands out against the mana storm's electric blue highlights.  Ahead of it, a checkpoint wooden kiosk with a wide sign attached to its front stands in the way.
